calendar.matters:
Second Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Relief From Government Claim Filing Requirements
Off Calendar Mar-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ASHOD DONIKIAN Second Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Relief From Government Claim Filing Requirements.

Petitioner Ashod Donikian's petition for relief from Government Act claims filing requirements is granted.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Relief From Government Claim Filing Requirements
Off Calendar Feb-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PETITIONER ASHOD DONIKIAN'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Relief From Government Claim Filing Requirements.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Off calendar. Moving party failed to lodge courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Relief From Government Claim Filing Requirements
Off Calendar Dec-27-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ASHOD DONIKIAN'S Hearing On Petition For Relief From Government Claim Filing Requirements.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Off calendar. The moving and opposing parties failed to provide courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Victor M. Hwang. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/VMH)
